# Michael Tommaso — Systems Atlas

> Portfolio of Michael Tommaso, who builds AI systems and operational software.
> The site is a "Fluid Systems Atlas": a living map where each section is a route
> from idea to working artifact.

## About

Michael builds useful AI systems and operational software, and prototypes across
engineering, machine learning, and product. Core focus areas:

- Agent orchestration and AI runtimes
- Multi-tenant operational SaaS
- Creative, design-to-deploy software pipelines

## Flagship systems

- [MimirAgent](https://github.com/michaeljtommaso): Hermes-style agent orchestration runtime — tools, persistent memory, worker fan-out, browser control, code execution, voice, and schedules.
- [McCallos](https://github.com/michaeljtommaso): Multi-tenant property operations platform — dashboards, role permissions, mobile field capture, and workflow automation.
- [Website Foundry](https://github.com/michaeljtommaso): Design-to-deploy pipeline — precedent scouting, sketch generation, asset synthesis, agentic build, and browser verification.

## Selected builds

- Machine Learning Stock Trading Bot — Python ML trading system with rolling training windows.
- Lightweight Aquatic Vehicle — underwater transport device prototyped with 3D modeling and custom circuitry.
- Early interactive builds — Punnett Square Generator, Chi-Squared Calculator, Metronome, and more.

- GitHub: https://github.com/michaeljtommaso
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaeltommaso
